title: Accessing Databases with R
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of connecting to a database, querying data, and bringing the results into R for analysis.
relationships: R uses DBI/odbc packages to load a database driver
Driver establishes a connection to the database server
R sends an SQL query through the connection
Database server executes the query and returns a result set
DBI fetches the result set and converts it into an R data frame
